feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to define user authorization for SAC with Public Cloud in Cloud Identity Services?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

We have a SAC system connected to the Public Cloud. In Cloud Identity Services, the user role is Constant and Embedded BI Admin is given. In other words, everyone who has a user in the Public Cloud also has a user in the SAC, and all users have Admin authority.

However, instead, only some users should be defined as SAC users and only a few of these users should be given Admin authority. Is there any way to achieve this?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Profit Center Hierarchy in Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional
entry.content:
It is not clear how to report on a profit center hierarchy within the Balance Sheet/Income Statement app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4HC Adding Logic to Custom Business Objects
entry.content:
I've been following along with the tutorial on Implement Logic for a Custom Business Object 

In there they say to implement additional logic for After Modification and Before Save  - and as per the SAP Help

But is there some trick to getting this code to execute on the create event when using the application ?.  My published application has the actioned as actions links on the menu bar instead that I need to click on.  I want to create a record and for it to automatically trigger them on those events and I don't want those 2 to appear on the menu bar.

entry.title: Need city field as mandatory in delivery address tab in purchase order.
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if we can make city field as mandatory before saving the PO in S/4HANA Public Cloud. 

Thanks

Simran

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if the use of SAP Cloud ALMP is mandatory when implementing SAP S/4 Public Cloud Edtion.

Thank you.

 Carina

entry.title: QM manage usage decisions (F2345) - reset usage decision
entry.content:
In version 2308, there was a way  to reset a usage decision using app F2345 manage usage decisions.

I can't find this feature now in version 2402.

Maybe I don't use it correctly.

Do you have any clue how to manage this feature now in 2402 ?

entry.title: Hu identification in Warehouse monitor result
entry.content:
Hello,

My client uses HU identification as the alternative HU number, which avoids relabeling the entire stock.

This field is available in the search window, as shown in the screenshot,

 

but at the result viewing level, this field is not available. Is it possible to add it?

If yes, how ?

Thanks in advance for your help

Eric

entry.title: I could not find CDS view for tax code in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi there 

In S4 Hana Public Cloud, I am trying to find relevant CDS view for tax code, tax procedures and tax access sequences based on Tax Code found in my accounting document in I_OperationalAcctgDocTaxItem and I_OperationalAcctgDocItem view. I need to map internally to fetch the GST rates for my custom solution. 

I am familiar with similar steps how to do in SAP ECC or prior Classic GL or New GL utilizing the tables T007, T007A, T007C with condition record based searching from KNVH etc condition record tables. Looking for a similar steps to map my tax calculation. 

Appreciate any help.

Regards Sivasankaran

entry.title: Using EPPM projects created before the change in accounting principles to ledgers
entry.content:
Our project is scheduled for GoLive in two weeks, and we have decided to switch the accounting principles of the ledger according to the contents of this blog(SAP Recommendation: Assignment of Corporate Accoun... - SAP Community).

What I would like to know is whether or not the EPPM projects (around 9,000) that were already migrated (before swapping the ledger accounting principle) in the production system can/should not be used after swapping the ledger accounting principle (after transferring over customizations).
No transaction data (journal entry data) has yet been registered in the production system (otherwise it would be impossible to switch the accounting principles of the ledger).
If already registered EPPM projects become unusable, the transition schedule will need to be significantly revised, which will have a huge impact on GoLive in two weeks.

I would like to know as soon as possible whether I can use the EPPM project or not.
I would be very grateful if any experts could answer my question.

entry.title: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana Conection in SAP Analytics cloud?
entry.content: I am trying to access a custom CDS view on the S/4HANA public cloud using SAC. I noticed that both OData and S/4HANA connections can be used to access the custom CDS view. Could someone explain the differences between these two methods? Also, which method is generally recommended for accessing custom CDS views?

entry.title: Change log for customer, vendor, and associate master data changes
entry.content:
Need to know which App or CDS view to use to get a report to see the change logs for business partners, customer, suppliers and associated master. This requirement came from Auditors


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it really impossible to assign the same sales group to multiple sales offices in SAP CBC?
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like to ask a question regarding Sales offices and Sales groups in SAP CBC.

We are currently working on completing the organisational structure in CBC and faced with an issue that we are not able to assign the same sales group to multiple sales offices.

We would like to know if it is really impossible as multiple assignment is needed for our case.

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: How to register Bank Account ID
entry.content:
There is no "Bank Account ID" in the API settings. Please tell me how to set it.

This is the API information in question.

DebtorItem | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: how to copy a flavor from one t-code to another t-code?
entry.content: i have created a flavor for migo t-code. I want the same  flavor for MM01 too. Is there any possibilities to copy a one flavor from one t-code to another directly? SAP Screen Personas SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: I am unable to print multi level BOM output after material is configured in advance VC in public clo
entry.content:
Hi,

we are implementing SAPS4 HANA public cloud edition with Variant Configurator , however as there is no CDS view to print Multi level bom, please suggest the solution

entry.title: Linking Project WBS to Timesheets in the "Manage My Timesheet" App
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to understand how to link the project WBS to the timesheet in the "Manage My Timesheet" app.

Attached Screen shot for your Reference. 

Thanks and Regards,

SMK Ganesh

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud outbound SOAP call SalesOrderBulkErrorLog_Out
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am creating sales order in S/4HANA Public Cloud from EDI message via CPI using SOAP message SalesOrderBulkRequest_In (SAP_COM_0288). This interface is working as expected. Link to business accelerator hub.

Now, I want to capture the errors in CPI through an outbound call from S/4HANA system via SalesOrderBulkErrorLog_Out under the same communication scenario. Link

I have created the communication user and enabled the outbound service in communication arrangement.

 

Configured an iFow in CPI with the endpoint specified in communication arrangement:

 

But, still the iflow is not triggered and 302 (redirect) error is displayed in message monitoring app.

 

Is there any specific setting I am missing? Could you please help?

Regards,

Anupam

entry.title: How to delete components in a planned order manually?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to remove components in planned order level?

In "Component overview" mode I can only change existing BOM and in "Collective Entry" mode only add new components.

How I can remove a component from planned order?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tcode F-90 / App with the same funtionality in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts!

Could you please clarify to me if in SAP Public cloud there is some app same as tcode F-90 in onpremise implementation?.
My client does not have logistic module implementation but only FI module and I´m wondering if there is any app that can make aposting vendor against fixed asset?

Thanks!
